creator: rcm@rcm.sh
text:
Created attachment 239430
update net/libmaxminddb to 1.7.1

This updates to v.1.7.1 and also consumes the source tarball from GitHub instead of the pre-generated "release" from MaxMind. If we still need the patch to configure to `Fix __int128 detection on i386`, we can patch configure.ac instead.
